footer.bio: Handcrafted candles made in Cadaqués, inspired by the Costa Brava landscape and crafted with 100% eco soy wax.
footer.newsletterText: Seasonal arrivals, new scents and stories from the coast.
footer.newsletterThanks: Thank you! You'll hear from us soon.

home.heroTitle:
The light
of the coast,
in a candle.
home.heroSubtitle: Handcrafted in Cadaqués with eco soy wax and essences inspired by the Costa Brava. Every candle is unique, like the landscape that inspires it.
home.heroSceneCaption: Noon at a whitewashed house on carrer des Call.
home.craftTitle:
Every candle
is made by hand,
one by one.
home.craftText: We use 100% eco soy wax, free from paraffins and toxins. Each candle burns for 45 to 55 hours, emitting up to 80% less CO₂ than conventional candles.
home.seaText: Our scents are born from watching the Mediterranean. The state of the sea reminds us every day why we do what we do.
home.seaQuote: «The wind decides how the wick falls.»
home.familiesTitle: Five ways to lose track of time.
home.closingQuote: «When you light one of our candles you don't buy a product — you light a corner of Cadaqués.»

products.title: All candles

quiSom.title: Who we are
quiSom.subtitle: Handcrafted candles made by hand, at the rhythm of the Mediterranean. Inspired by the sea of Cadaqués, created with love and natural soy wax.
quiSom.story1: Sea & Candles was born in Cadaqués, one of the most beautiful villages on the Costa Brava, from a passion for craft and a deep connection with the Mediterranean. The sea has always been our source of inspiration: its colours, its textures, its calm.
quiSom.story2: It all began with a desire to learn how to work with soy wax and Jesmonite resins. Hours in the studio, colour trials, scents that evoked salt, breeze and stone. Gradually, the candles took on their own form — marine shapes, natural textures, Mediterranean essences.
quiSom.story3: Today, every candle we make carries the same spirit: made with care, without haste, with natural and sustainable materials. Because we believe that beautiful things need time and intention.
quiSom.craftText: Every piece is unique and handmade. We take the time needed to ensure the quality and detail that each candle deserves. We don't mass-produce — we create real craft.
quiSom.naturText: We use natural soy wax, cotton wicks and fragrances free of harmful substances. We respect the environment in every decision, from materials to packaging.
quiSom.cadaquesText: We are children of Cap de Creus. Our village, its light, its coves and its Mediterranean character permeate every creation. Cadaqués is not just where we live — it is where we come from.
quiSom.teamText1: We are a small project, made with great care. Behind Sea & Candles is a Cadaqués artisan with a passion for manual creativity, natural scents and the beauty of simple things.
quiSom.teamText2: Every candle that leaves the studio has passed through our hands, has been tended, smelled and approved. There is no piece we have not enjoyed making.
quiSom.ctaText: Discover our handcrafted candles and bring a little of Cadaqués home.
